scripts.start:dev:db: cross-env DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH=../../.env PORT=3002 USE_DB_PRISMA=true node -r dotenv/config ./node_modules/@nestjs/cli/bin/nest.js start --watch
scripts.start:dev:mem: cross-env DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH=../../.env PORT=3001 ENABLE_FAKE_SIGNUP=true node -r dotenv/config ./node_modules/@nestjs/cli/bin/nest.js start --watch
scripts.test:debug: cross-env DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH=../../.env node -r dotenv/config node --inspect-brk -r tsconfig-paths/register -r ts-node/register ./node_modules/jest/bin/jest.js --runInBand
scripts.test:bdd: cross-env DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH=../../.env cucumber-js ../../features/**/*.feature --require-module ts-node/register --require dotenv/config --require bdd/steps/**/*.ts --format progress
scripts.test:bdd:mvp: cross-env DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH=../../.env cucumber-js ../../features/{landing,member-signup,sessions-list,session-register}.feature --require-module ts-node/register --require dotenv/config --require bdd/steps/**/*.ts --format progress
scripts.test:bdd:mvp:report: cross-env DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH=../../.env cucumber-js ../../features/{landing,member-signup,sessions-list,session-register}.feature --require-module ts-node/register --require dotenv/config --require bdd/steps/**/*.ts --format json:../../.windsurf/plans/bdd-mvp-report.json --format progress
scripts.test:bdd:clerk: cross-env DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH=../../.env cucumber-js ../../features/clerk-user-sync.feature --require-module ts-node/register --require dotenv/config --require bdd/steps/clerk-sync.steps.ts --format progress
